--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/edi-claim-service 3/docker-compose-snippet.yml ---
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# POSEIDON EDI Service — Docker Compose Service Block
# Copy this into your main docker-compose.yml under 'services:'
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  edi:
    build:
      context: ./services/edi
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: poseidon_edi
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      <<: *common-env
      SERVICE_NAME: edi
      SERVICE_PORT: "8005"
      POSEIDON_URL: http://poseidon-core:8001

      # Stedi API — get from https://www.stedi.com/app/settings/api-keys
      STEDI_API_KEY: ${STEDI_API_KEY:-}

      # ISA envelope — assigned by clearinghouse during enrollment
      ISA_SENDER_ID: ${ISA_SENDER_ID:-STRYKEFOX      }
      ISA_RECEIVER_ID: ${ISA_RECEIVER_ID:-030240928      }
      ISA_SENDER_QUAL: ${ISA_SENDER_QUAL:-ZZ}
      ISA_RECEIVER_QUAL: ${ISA_RECEIVER_QUAL:-ZZ}

      # Dry run mode — set to 'true' to build payloads without submitting
      EDI_DRY_RUN: ${EDI_DRY_RUN:-true}

      # SFTP fallback for payers without API submission
      SFTP_HOST: ${SFTP_HOST:-}
      SFTP_USER: ${SFTP_USER:-}
      SFTP_KEY_PATH: /app/keys/sftp_key
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8005:8005"
    volumes:
      - ./services/edi:/app
      - ./keys:/app/keys:ro
    networks:
      - poseidon-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8005/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# NGINX — Add to your poseidon.conf
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# upstream edi { server poseidon_edi:8005; }
#
# server {
#     listen 80;
#     server_name edi.strykefox.com;
#     location / {
#         proxy_pass http://edi;
#         proxy_set_header Host $host;
#         proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
#         proxy_read_timeout 60s;
#         client_max_body_size 50M;   # for 835 file uploads
#     }
# }


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# .env additions — append to your .env file
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# # ── EDI Service ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEDI_API_KEY=<from stedi.com dashboard>
# ISA_SENDER_ID=STRYKEFOX       # 15 chars, assigned by clearinghouse
# ISA_RECEIVER_ID=030240928      # 15 chars, assigned by clearinghouse
# ISA_SENDER_QUAL=ZZ
# ISA_RECEIVER_QUAL=ZZ
# EDI_DRY_RUN=true               # Set to 'false' when ready to go live

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/matia_complete 2/docker-compose.yml ---
version: "3.8"

services:
  matia-api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: matia-api
    ports:
      - "8010:8010"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///./matia.db
      - JWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET:-matia-change-me-in-production}
      - CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:3005,https://matia.strykefox.com
    volumes:
      - matia-data:/app/generated
      - matia-db:/app
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8010/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

volumes:
  matia-data:
  matia-db:

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/docker-compose.yml ---
# =============================================================================
# POSEIDON Healthcare RCM Platform — StrykeFox
# Production Docker Compose
#
# Local run (no cloud DB): start Docker, then from repo root:
#   ./scripts/docker-up.sh
# Or: copy .env.template to .env, then  docker compose up -d --build
# Compose defaults: Postgres on :5432, DB poseidon/poseidon, Redis password
# localredis, INTERNAL_API_KEY poseidon-local-internal-key, EDI dry-run ON.
# DB for app containers: use POSEIDON_DATABASE_URL to override bundled Postgres.
# Do not rely on DATABASE_URL from .env for Compose — that broke many setups (stale cloud URLs).
# Override in .env for production (especially INTERNAL_API_KEY).
# =============================================================================

networks:
  poseidon_net:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  redis_data:
  minio_data:
  training_data:
  postgres_data:

services:

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # INFRASTRUCTURE
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  redis:
    image: redis:7.4.8-alpine
    container_name: poseidon_redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --requirepass ${POSEIDON_REDIS_PASSWORD:-localredis}
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    networks:
      - poseidon_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "--no-auth-warning", "-a", "${POSEIDON_REDIS_PASSWORD:-localredis}", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  minio:
    image: minio/minio:RELEASE.2025-04-03T14-56-28Z
    container_name: poseidon_minio
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ACCESS_KEY:-poseidon}
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECRET_KEY:-poseidonlocal}
    volumes:
      - minio_data:/data
    networks:
      - poseidon_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:9000/minio/health/live"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: poseidon_postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSEIDON_POSTGRES_USER:-poseidon}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSEIDON_POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-poseidon}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSEIDON_POSTGRES_DB:-poseidon_db}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./scripts/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-init.sql:ro
    networks:
      - poseidon_net
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5432:5432"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U $$POSTGRES_USER -d $$POSTGRES_DB"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 12
      start_period: 20s

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # APPLICATION SERVICES
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  core:
    build:
      context: ./services
      dockerfile: core/Dockerfile
    container_name: poseidon_core
    restart: unless-stopped
    env_file: .env
    environment:
      SERVICE_NAME: core
      PORT: 8001
      # Shared base defaults ENVIRONMENT to production; placeholder .env secrets then abort startup.
      ENVIRONMENT: ${ENVIRONMENT:-development}
      EDI_API_URL: ${EDI_API_URL:-http://edi:8006}
      DATABASE_URL: ${POSEIDON_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://poseidon:poseidon@postgres:5432/poseidon_db}
      INTERNAL_API_KEY: ${INTERNAL_API_KEY:-poseidon-local-internal-key}
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ENDPOINT:-minio:9000}
      MINIO_PUBLIC_ENDPOINT: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_PUBLIC_ENDPOINT:-minio:9000}
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ACCESS_KEY:-poseidon}
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECRET_KEY:-poseidonlocal}
      MINIO_BUCKET: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_BUCKET:-poseidon-docs}
      MINIO_SECURE: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECURE:-false}
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ${POSEIDON_REDIS_PASSWORD:-localredis}
      REDIS_URL: ${POSEIDON_REDIS_URL:-redis://:localredis@redis:6379/0}
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      minio:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      # Local `next dev`: set CORE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001 in frontend/.env.local
      - "127.0.0.1:8001:8001"
    networks:
      - poseidon_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-fsS", "-H", "Host: api.strykefox.com", "http://127.0.0.1:8001/ready"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s

  trident:
    build:
      context: ./services
      dockerfile: trident/Dockerfile
    container_name: poseidon_trident
    restart: unless-stopped
    env_file: .env
    environment:
      SERVICE_NAME: trident
      PORT: 8002
      ENVIRONMENT: ${ENVIRONMENT:-development}
      DATABASE_URL: ${POSEIDON_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://poseidon:poseidon@postgres:5432/poseidon_db}
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ${POSEIDON_REDIS_PASSWORD:-localredis}
      REDIS_URL: ${POSEIDON_REDIS_URL:-redis://:localredis@redis:6379/0}
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ENDPOINT:-minio:9000}
      MINIO_PUBLIC_ENDPOINT: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_PUBLIC_ENDPOINT:-minio:9000}
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ACCESS_KEY:-poseidon}
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECRET_KEY:-poseidonlocal}
      MINIO_BUCKET: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_BUCKET:-poseidon-docs}
      MINIO_SECURE: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECURE:-false}
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
      - ./services/trident/Historical_Model_Data:/app/Historical_Model_Data
      - training_data:/app/models
    networks:
      - poseidon_net
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-fsS", "-H", "Host: trident.strykefox.com", "http://127.0.0.1:8002/ready"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s

  intake:
    build:
      context: ./services
      dockerfile: intake/Dockerfile
    container_name: poseidon_intake
    restart: unless-stopped
    env_file: .env
    environment:
      SERVICE_NAME: intake
      PORT: 8003
      ENVIRONMENT: ${ENVIRONMENT:-development}
      DATABASE_URL: ${POSEIDON_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://poseidon:poseidon@postgres:5432/poseidon_db}
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ${POSEIDON_REDIS_PASSWORD:-localredis}
      REDIS_URL: ${POSEIDON_REDIS_URL:-redis://:localredis@redis:6379/0}
      MINIO_ENDPOINT: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ENDPOINT:-minio:9000}
      MINIO_PUBLIC_ENDPOINT: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_PUBLIC_ENDPOINT:-minio:9000}
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_ACCESS_KEY:-poseidon}
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECRET_KEY:-poseidonlocal}
      MINIO_BUCKET: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_BUCKET:-poseidon-docs}
      MINIO_SECURE: ${POSEIDON_MINIO_SECURE:-false}
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
    networks:
      - poseidon_net
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-fsS", "-H", "Host: intake.strykefox.com", "http://127.0.0.1:8003/ready"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s

  # POSEIDON LITE: patient repository + compliance document generator (minimal API)
  lite:
    build:
      context: ./services
      dockerfile: lite/Dockerfile
    container_name: poseidon_lite
    restart: unless-stopped

      SERVICE_NAME: lite

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/frontend/nginx.conf ---
server {
    listen 3001;
    server_name _;

    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.html;

    location = /index.html {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0" always;
        try_files $uri =404;
    }

    location /src/ {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0" always;
        try_files $uri =404;
    }

    location /assets/ {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0" always;
        try_files $uri =404;
    }

    location /logo.svg {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0" always;
        try_files $uri =404;
    }

    location / {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0" always;
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }
}

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/nginx/nginx.conf ---
# =============================================================================
# POSEIDON — nginx reverse proxy
# =============================================================================

events {
    worker_connections 1024;
}

http {
    include /etc/nginx/mime.types;
    default_type application/octet-stream;
    server_tokens off;
    resolver 127.0.0.11 valid=10s ipv6=off;
    resolver_timeout 5s;

    # Logging
    log_format main '$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" '
                    '$status $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" "$http_user_agent"';

    access_log /var/log/nginx/access.log main;
    error_log  /var/log/nginx/error.log warn;

    # Timeouts
    keepalive_timeout 65;
    client_max_body_size 50M;  # for EOB/document uploads
    proxy_read_timeout 120;
    proxy_connect_timeout 10;

    # Gzip
    gzip on;
    gzip_types application/json text/plain text/css application/javascript;

    # Security headers (applied to all responses)
    add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
    add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
    add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
    add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;

    # Rate limiting
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=api:10m rate=60r/m;
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=auth:10m rate=10r/m;
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=upload:10m rate=10r/m;

    # Shared proxy headers
    map $http_upgrade $connection_upgrade {
        default upgrade;
        ''      close;
    }
    map $host $core_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_core:8001;
    }
    map $host $trident_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_trident:8002;
    }
    map $host $intake_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_intake:8003;
    }
    map $host $ml_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_ml:8004;
    }
    map $host $dashboard_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_dashboard:3000;
    }
    map $host $availity_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_availity:8005;
    }
    map $host $edi_upstream {
        default http://poseidon_edi:8006;
    }

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # api.strykefox.com → Core API
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    server {
        listen 80;
        server_name api.strykefox.com;
        # TLS (uncomment and set cert paths for production; then redirect 80 → 443)
        # listen 443 ssl http2;
        # ssl_certificate     /etc/nginx/ssl/fullchain.pem;
        # ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/privkey.pem;
        # add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" always;

        location / {
            limit_req zone=api burst=20 nodelay;
            proxy_pass $core_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }
        location /api/v1/auth/ {
            limit_req zone=auth burst=5 nodelay;
            proxy_pass $core_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }
    }

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # trident.strykefox.com → Trident Engine
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    server {
        listen 80;
        server_name trident.strykefox.com;

        location / {
            limit_req zone=api burst=30 nodelay;
            proxy_pass $trident_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }
    }

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # intake.strykefox.com → Intake Service
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    server {
        listen 80;
        server_name intake.strykefox.com;

        location / {
            limit_req zone=upload burst=5 nodelay;
            proxy_pass $intake_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }
    }

    server {
        listen 80;
        server_name ml.strykefox.com;

        location / {
            limit_req zone=api burst=20 nodelay;
            proxy_pass $ml_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }
    }

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # edi.strykefox.com → EDI Service (837P/835)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    server {
        listen 80;
        server_name edi.strykefox.com;

        client_max_body_size 50M;  # for 835 file uploads

        location / {
            limit_req zone=api burst=20 nodelay;
            proxy_pass $edi_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }
    }

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Dashboard (default: localhost + dashboard.strykefox.com)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    server {
        listen 80 default_server;
        server_name dashboard.strykefox.com app.strykefox.com localhost 127.0.0.1;

        location = /healthz {
            access_log off;
            return 200 'ok';
            add_header Content-Type text/plain;
        }

        location /api/auth/ {
            proxy_pass $dashboard_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }

        location /api/admin/ {
            proxy_pass $dashboard_upstream;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }

        location = /api/health {
            proxy_pass $dashboard_upstream/api/health;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Host dashboard.strykefox.com;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Port $server_port;
            proxy_set_header X-Request-Id $request_id;
        }

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/aries 2/node_modules/@expo/devcert/openssl-configurations/domain-certificate-signing-requests.conf ---
[ req ]
# Which algorithm to use
default_md = sha256
# Don't prompt the TTY for input, just use the config file values
prompt = no
# Interpret strings as utf8, not ASCII
utf8 = yes
# This specifies the section containing the distinguished name fields to
# prompt for when generating a certificate request.
distinguished_name = req_distinguished_name
# This specifies the configuration file section containing a list of extensions
# to add to the certificate request.
req_extensions = req_extensions

[ req_distinguished_name ]
CN = %DOMAIN%

[ req_extensions ]
basicConstraints = CA:FALSE
subjectAltName = @subject_alt_names
subjectKeyIdentifier = hash

[ subject_alt_names ]
DNS.1 = %DOMAIN%
DNS.2 = *.%DOMAIN%

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/aries 2/node_modules/@expo/devcert/openssl-configurations/domain-certificates.conf ---
[ ca ]
default_ca = devcert_ca

[ devcert_ca ]
# Serial file that counts up unique IDs for each cert issued
serial = %SERIALFILE%
# Database file that tracks all issued certs
database = %DATABASEFILE%
# Where to put the new cert
new_certs_dir = %DOMAINDIR%
# Which algorithm to use
default_md = sha256
# Don't prompt the TTY for input, just use the config file values
prompt = no
# Interpret strings as utf8, not ASCII
utf8 = yes
# This specifies the configuration file section containing a list of extensions
# to add to the certificate request.
req_extensions = req_extensions
x509_extensions = domain_certificate_extensions
# How long is the domain cert good for
default_days = 7000
# What do CSRs need to supply?
policy = loose_policy

[ loose_policy ]
commonName = supplied

[ domain_certificate_extensions ]
basicConstraints = critical, CA:FALSE
subjectKeyIdentifier = hash
authorityKeyIdentifier = keyid,issuer:always
keyUsage = critical, digitalSignature, keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth
subjectAltName = @subject_alt_names

[ subject_alt_names ]
DNS.1 = %DOMAIN%
DNS.2 = *.%DOMAIN%

--- FILE: /Volumes/WORKSPACE/poseidon 2/aries 2/node_modules/@expo/devcert/openssl-configurations/certificate-authority-self-signing.conf ---
[ req ]
# Which algorithm to use
default_md = sha256
# Don't prompt the TTY for input, just use the config file values
prompt = no
# Interpret strings as utf8, not ASCII
utf8 = yes
# This specifies the section containing the distinguished name fields to
# prompt for when generating a certificate request.
distinguished_name = req_distinguished_name
# This specifies the configuration file section containing a list of extensions
# to add to the certificate request.
x509_extensions = v3_ca
# How long is the CA valid for
default_days = 7000

[ req_distinguished_name ]
CN = devcert

[ v3_ca ]
subjectKeyIdentifier = hash
authorityKeyIdentifier = keyid:always,issuer
# Mark our CA as a CA, and only allow it to issue server certificates - no intermediate certificates allowed
basicConstraints = critical, CA:true, pathlen:0
keyUsage = critical, digitalSignature, cRLSign, keyCertSign

  "scripts": {
    "fix-cli-permissions": "output=$(npx baseline-browser-mapping 2>&1); path=$(printf '%s\n' \"$output\" | sed -n 's/^.*: \\(.*\\): Permission denied$/\\1/p; t; s/^\\(.*\\): Permission denied$/\\1/p'); if [ -n \"$path\" ]; then echo \"Permission denied for: $path\"; echo \"Removing $path ...\"; rm -rf \"$path\"; else echo \"$output\"; fi",
    "test:format": "npx prettier --check .",
    "test:lint": "npx eslint .",
    "test:legacy-test": "node spec/legacy-tests/legacy-test.cjs; node dist/cli.cjs",

    "refresh-static": "npx tsx scripts/refresh-static.ts",
    "update-data-file": "npx tsx scripts/update-data-file.ts; npx prettier ./src/data/data.js --write",
    "update-data-dependencies": "npm i @mdn/browser-compat-data@latest web-features@latest -D",
    "check-data-changes": "git diff --name-only | grep -q '^src/data/data.js$' && echo 'changes-available=TRUE' || echo 'changes-available=FALSE'"
  },
